prerequisiteDocs: FE-05/FE-06 test case read models: docs/frontend/FE-05-test-generation-frontend and docs/frontend/FE-06-boundary-negative-generation-frontend

notes: environmentId omit => fallback sang default execution environment cua project.
selectedTestCaseIds omit hoac rong => run tat ca test case dang enabled.
Guid.Empty va duplicate trong selectedTestCaseIds bi loai bo truoc khi vao handler.
selectedTestCaseIds chi chon subset, khong dieu khien thu tu thuc thi.
Runtime list query pageNumber min 1 va pageSize clamp 1..100.
List response chi doc summary tu PostgreSQL, khong phu thuoc cache.
status la chuoi enum vi view model dung ToString().
runNumber tang dan theo tung suite, nhung list API sort theo CreatedDateTime desc roi moi tie-break Id desc.
hasDetailedResults duoc tinh tu resultsExpireAt > utcNow, khong phai cache probe.
durationMs hien la tong latency cua tung test case, khong phai wall-clock end-to-end duration.
Current implementation luon dat resultsSource = "cache".
POST /test-runs va GET /results deu dung cung shape nay.
executedAt hien lay theo run.StartedAt (fallback utcNow neu can).
Khong co pagination tren cases.
orderIndex la thu tu execution runtime duoc reindex 0..N-1.
resolvedUrl khong kem query string runtime vi query params duoc append muon hon trong HttpTestExecutor.
Detailed result khong tra ve resolved body, resolved query params, hay bodyType.
requestHeaders la final headers sau env auth/default headers inject va request-level headers override; hien khong duoc mask.
responseBodyPreview bi truncate toi da 65536 ky tu va hien khong co field bao truncate.
extractedVariables chi duoc mask bang keyword-based rule tren ten bien chua token/secret/password/apikey.
target/expected/actual chi xuat hien khi loai validation can so sanh chi tiet.
DEPENDENCY_FAILED va UNRESOLVED_VARIABLE thuong chi co code + message.

endpoints.name: StartTestRun
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails for empty suiteId, non-owner access, suite not Ready, selected subset missing dependencies, selected disabled/missing test case, concurrent run limit denial, or monthly run quota denial.
404 when suiteId does not exist, explicit environmentId does not exist in the suite project, or project has no default environment while environmentId is omitted.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED when FE-05A gate has no active applied order.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=CACHE_WRITE_FAILED when run summary was saved but detailed results could not be written to cache.
notes: Current implementation la synchronous request-response: response chi tra ve sau khi orchestrator da chay xong.
Success response da gom full detailed result, nen FE khong can poll ngay lap tuc.
Controller hien tai tra 201 khong kem Location header.
selectedTestCaseIds chi la tap subset; execution order duoc backend recompute theo approved endpoint order + testcase order rules.
Neu run chi tiet write cache that bai, backend van co the da persist summary va run status Failed trong DB truoc khi tra 409.

endpoints.name: ListTestRuns
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails when pageNumber/pageSize cannot be parsed as integers by ASP.NET model binding.
notes: Invalid status values bi ignore silently vi controller chi set filter khi Enum.TryParse thanh cong.
List query khong can doc detailed cache payload.
hasDetailedResults co the false ngay ca khi summary van ton tai va doc duoc binh thuong.

endpoints.name: GetTestRunDetail
problemCases: 404 when suiteId does not exist or runId does not exist inside the suite.
notes: Day la summary-only endpoint; khong doc detailed result tu cache.
Dau ra van dung duoc ke ca khi detailed cache da het han.

endpoints.name: GetTestRunResults
problemCases: 404 when suiteId does not exist or runId does not exist inside the suite.
409 ProblemDetails with reasonCode=RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED when RedisKey is empty, ResultsExpireAt is in the past, or cache no longer contains the payload.
notes: Results payload luon doc tu cache, sau do backend override field run bang summary moi nhat tu DB.
Current runtime tra 409 khi ket qua het han, khong tra 410.
Neu UI chi can summary sau khi het han cache, dung GET /test-runs hoac GET /test-runs/{runId}.

runtimeRules: Start run can suite owner + suite.Status == Ready + FE-05A gate pass qua active proposal co AppliedOrder khong rong.
Execution environment runtime chi resolve auth mot lan moi run; OAuth2 client credentials khong xin token moi test case.
Variable bag precedence la env variables truoc, extracted run variables de sau nen extracted vars se override env vars.
Request-level headers override env default/auth headers, nen negative auth tests co the co chu y ghi de Authorization hoac header khac.
Absolute test-case URL duoc giu nguyen; relative URL moi ghep voi environment.baseUrl sau khi trim slash.
Timeout moi request bi clamp trong khoang 1000..60000 ms.
HTTP body chi duoc gui cho POST/PUT/PATCH; GET/DELETE co body trong source model hien se khong duoc send.
Transport errors duoc map thanh failed case voi code HTTP_REQUEST_ERROR va httpStatusCode = null.
Dependency fail khong lam dependent case Failed; no duoc mark Skipped va co skippedBecauseDependencyIds.
Validation engine khong goi LLM; no danh gia status code, JSON schema, header exact-match, body contains, body not contains, JSONPath equality, va max response time.
Schema validation fallback sang endpoint metadata schema dau tien khi expectation.responseSchema rong; neu van khong co schema thi bo qua check schema.
JSONPath equality co numeric/bool coercion nhe, nhung string compare van giu exact ordinal match.
Summary run status cuoi cung duoc set thanh Failed neu failedCount > 0, nguoc lai la Completed.
Detailed result payload luu trong distributed cache voi absolute expiration tu ResultsExpireAt; summary luu trong PostgreSQL.
responseBodyPreview va body doc tu HTTP executor deu bi gioi han toi da 65536 ky tu.

failureReasons.message: Ma trang thai khong khop. Mong doi: [200], thuc te: 403.
Test case bi bo qua vi dependency khong thanh cong.

getTestRunResultsExpired409.title: Conflict
getTestRunResultsExpired409.detail: Chi tiet ket qua da het han luu tru trong cache.
getTestRunResultsExpired409.message: Chi tiet ket qua da het han luu tru trong cache.

startTestRunOrderGate409.title: Conflict
startTestRunOrderGate409.detail: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.
startTestRunOrderGate409.message: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.

startTestRunMissingDependency400.title: Bad Request
startTestRunMissingDependency400.detail: Danh sach test case duoc chon thieu cac dependency can thiet: 'Get profile' phu thuoc 'Login'.
startTestRunMissingDependency400.message: Danh sach test case duoc chon thieu cac dependency can thiet: 'Get profile' phu thuoc 'Login'.

relatedNotes: GET /test-runs/{runId}/results la endpoint cache-backed. Sau khi het han, FE van phai dung summary endpoints neu can lich su.
Neu UI can hien full source request/expectation/variables cua test case, can ghep them data tu FE-05/FE-06 shared test-case read endpoints.
Execution environment auth secret masking thuoc FE-04 CRUD response; detailed run results hien khong mask requestHeaders sau auth injection.
